name: claire
description: Claire is a targeted adversarial-critique plugin for Claude Code. It ships two slash commands — /claire:challenge, which routes your plan, claim or decision to the right kind of critic, and /claire:blank, which gets a cold outside read from a context-starved advisor — each backed by a dedicated subagent. Its defining feature is de-priming: before any critic runs, the brief is stripped of the answer you expect and checked by a separate leak-auditor, so the critic genuinely challenges instead of confirming. A PreToolUse gate enforces this — a critic dispatch passes silently only once the leak-auditor has actually cleared the brief (verified by a receipt a PostToolUse hook writes), not on a self-typed marker. It is deliberately not always-on: nothing fires until you invoke a claire command.
